text.autoconfig.spctreutils.title: SpctreUtils
text.autoconfig.spctreutils.option.featu: Allows you to clip through blocks. Must be in singleplayer.
Prints number of entities at the block you are looking at.
Copies the coordinates of the block you are looking at to clipboard.
Bypass placement restrictions. Must be in singleplayer.
Makes you invincible. Must be in singleplayer.
Prints number of entities at the block you are looking at.
Lets you configure creative mode flight speed.
text.autoconfig.spctreutils.option.hud.h: Main toggle for rendering HUD elements.
text.autoconfig.spctreutils.option.hud.d: Displays the durability of the item you are currently holding.
text.autoconfig.spctreutils.option.hud.e: Displays the health of the entity you are looking at.
Displays the owner of the entity you are looking at, if tamed.
text.autoconfig.spctreutils.option.hud.g: Displays the variant of the goat you are looking at.
text.autoconfig.spctreutils.option.hud.h: Displays the max speed of the horse you are looking at.
Displays the max jump height of the horse you are looking at.
text.autoconfig.spctreutils.option.hud.p: Displays your coordinates scaled up/down by a factor of 8 depending on what dimension you're in.
